name: PydanticAI

name: EasyFL

name: Sacred
description: Sacred is a tool to help you configure, organize, log and reproduce experiments.

description: A compact ~450M parameter VLA by Hugging Face, designed to be computationally efficient and accessible, running on consumer GPUs or CPUs. Part of the LeRobot ecosystem.

description: DSPy is the framework for programming—not prompting—language models. It allows you to iterate fast on building modular AI systems and offers algorithms for optimizing prompts and weights.

description: Port of Facebook's LLaMA model in C/C++

description: Vector database for scalable similarity search and AI applications.

description: AgentEvolver: Towards Efficient Self-Evolving Agent System

name: TensorFlow Federated
description: A framework for implementing federated learning

name: Polyaxon
description: Machine Learning Management & Orchestration Platform.

name: Auto-PyTorch
description: Automatic architecture search and hyperparameter optimization for PyTorch.

name: mcp-scan
description: mcp-scan is an MCP security scanning tool for local and remote MCP Servers.

name: Opik
description: Confidently evaluate, test, and ship LLM applications with a suite of observability tools to calibrate language model outputs across your dev and production lifecycle.

name: OpenVLA
description: A 7B-parameter open-source Vision-Language-Action model trained on 970K+ robot demonstrations from the Open X-Embodiment dataset for generalist robotic manipulation.

name: ell
description: ell is a language model programming library that treats prompts as programs. Features automatic versioning, serialization, and rich tooling for prompt engineering with Ell Studio for visualization.

name: Shimmy
description: Python-free Rust inference server with OpenAI API compatibility and hot model swapping

description: A distributed system for embedding-based vector retrieval

description: RunAnywhere provides on-device AI SDKs for mobile apps (iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter) to run LLMs, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech locally without cloud dependencies.

name: Dolt
description: Git for Data.

name: PAI
description: Resource scheduling and cluster management for AI.

name: RoBO
description: a Robust Bayesian Optimization framework.

name: Agentic Security
description: Agentic Security is a vulnerability scanner for agentic workflows, protecting AI systems from jailbreaks, fuzzing, and multimodal attacks.

name: TensorZero
description: TensorZero is an open-source framework for building production-grade LLM applications. It unifies an LLM gateway, observability, optimization, evaluations, and experimentation.

name: LeRobot
description: A central community library by Hugging Face for AI in robotics — end-to-end learning tools, data pipelines, and support for training/deploying VLA models.

name: PromptSource
description: PromptSource is a toolkit for creating, sharing and using natural language prompts. Contains a growing collection of prompts (P3: Public Pool of Prompts) written in Jinja templating language.

name: lanarky
description: FastAPI framework to build production-grade LLM applications

name: VectorDB
description: A Python vector database you just need - no more, no less.
